channel.title: blog on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in blog on Have an average day :|

item.title: Blog Import!
item.description: I imported my blog! well mosst of it anyway. I’ve been dragging this thing along with me since the days of blogger! It’s been blogger, wordpress, ghost, and now hugo. I’m sure a lot of the formatting is messed up, images won’t show up, and links are all kinds of wrong. However it’s my mess and maybe one day I’ll get around to fixing it. Until then, it’s my blog in all it’s shame.

item.title: On Blogging
item.description: aardvark-g203: (From Bhuvan T./29/M/Bengaluru,India) How can i make my blog famous? (Type ‘pass’ to skip, or ‘more’ for extra options.) me: you need to do a blog on ninja, pirates, cute furry things, or rub your servers in yak blood. aardvark-g203: Great — I’ve sent that to Bhuvan. Thanks for the fast answer! (Type ‘Bhuvan:’ followed by a message to add something, or ‘more’ for options.
